expectations.text: Covers SEO items (title, meta, h1, canonical)
expectations.evidence: Table includes SEO-02 (title tag), SEO-05 (meta description), SEO-03 (h1), and SEO-06 (canonical URL) explicitly as named rows.
Output lists SEO-01 through SEO-10 as coded items in a structured table with code, priority, item name, result, and findings columns.
Each of the 10 SEO items has its own row with a result designation (all N/A due to no web files) and an explanation of why it is not applicable.

eval_feedback.overall: Excellent structured output with all 10 SEO-coded items evaluated per-item. Correctly identified no web files were changed and marked all items as N/A with clear reasoning in Korean.
